accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and the contextual statute references are correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; program names and statute references are accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose of broadening references beyond naloxone.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Names the 21st Century Cures Act and Public Health Service Act programs affected.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the update requirement applies only to pre-enactment references in the two specified grant programs.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the one-year update deadline after enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures both the prospective and existing-reference update requirements.

objective_tone.why: Summary is neutral and descriptive without editorializing.

correct_entities.why: HHS, FDA, the FFDCA, and the two grant programs are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The one-year deadline is stated correctly.
